personalized_outreach_message: Dear Deborah Frank, I am reaching out in my role as Program Director for a UC Berkeley program organized through the Berkeley Institute for Business Innovation at the Haas School of Business, in collaboration with the U.S. Department of State. We are hosting a cohort of 20 Ukrainian agricultural startups that are eager to expand into the U.S. and international markets, connect with partners, clients, investors, and technologists, and learn from experienced leaders in the sector. We would be honored to invite you to speak for a 90-minute session, with an honorarium of $1,500. Given your work as Mayor at City of Champaign, I believe your perspective would bring strong practical value to our cohort, especially as these startups look to better understand U.S. market expectations, partnership pathways, and international growth opportunities. Please do not hesitate to reach out to me directly at gauthier.vasseur@berkeley.edu if this could be of interest.
